channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Venezuela Earthquakes Live: La Guaria Hardest Hit State, Says President Delcy Rodriguez

media:content.media:description: Venezuela Earthquake Live: These quakes are among the strongest to strike Venezuela in over a century

item.description: 7.5 Magnitude Earthquake hit Venezuela Live Updates: The second earthquake struck just a minute later, with a 7.5-magnitude, and its epicentre was 16 kilometres southwest of Moron.
item.content:encoded: 7.5 Magnitude Earthquake hit Venezuela Live Updates: The second earthquake struck just a minute later, with a 7.5-magnitude, and its epicentre was 16 kilometres southwest of Moron.

item.title: Buildings Toppled, People Trapped: Pics Show Damage As Quakes Hit Venezuela

media:content.media:description: Venezuela Earthquake: Powerful tremors hit Caracas region during a public holiday.

item.description: Venezuela Earthquake: Twin strong earthquakes of magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 hit west of Caracas causing building collapses and injuries
item.content:encoded: Venezuela Earthquake: Twin strong earthquakes of magnitude 7.2 and 7.5 hit west of Caracas causing building collapses and injuries

item.title: "Don't Even Know How Long It Lasted": Venezuela Residents Recount Earthquake

media:content.media:description: The earthquakes triggered panic in Caracas and other Venezuelan states

item.description: Back-to-back powerful earthquakes of 7.2 and 7.5 magnitude struck Venezuela on Wednesday evening.
item.content:encoded: Back-to-back powerful earthquakes of 7.2 and 7.5 magnitude struck Venezuela on Wednesday evening.

item.title: Celebrity Island Drug Bust: Italian Police Divers Find Rs 5 Crore Hashish Stash In Secret Sea Cave

media:content.media:description: The Italian island of Ponza is a popular vacation spot for the rich and famous.

item.description: Italian police divers have uncovered 40 kilograms of hashish, worth an estimated Rs 5 Crore, hidden inside a secret sea cave on the celebrity holiday island of Ponza ahead of the busy summer tourist season.
item.content:encoded: Italian police divers have uncovered 40 kilograms of hashish, worth an estimated Rs 5 Crore, hidden inside a secret sea cave on the celebrity holiday island of Ponza ahead of the busy summer tourist season.

item.title: 32 Dead, 700 Injured In 2 Massive Back-To-Back Earthquakes In Venezuela

media:content.media:description: Emergency services work at the site of a collapsed building after an earthquake, in Caracas, Venezuela.

item.description: The US Geological Survey (USGS) estimates suggest death count due to twin earthquakes in Venezuela would likely range from 10,000 to a lakh.
item.content:encoded: The US Geological Survey (USGS) estimates suggest death count due to twin earthquakes in Venezuela would likely range from 10,000 to a lakh.

item.title: Powerful 7.2 Magnitude Earthquake Strikes Japan, No Tsunami Warning Issued

media:content.media:description: Japan Earthquake: There were no immediate reports of major damage.

item.description: A magnitude 6.9 earthquake struck northern Japan on Thursday, the country's weather agency said, adding that there was no tsunami warning.
item.content:encoded: A magnitude 6.9 earthquake struck northern Japan on Thursday, the country's weather agency said, adding that there was no tsunami warning.

item.title: Venezuela's 2 Back-To-Back Earthquakes Are Its Strongest In Over A Century

media:content.media:description: Strong earthquakes are unusual in Venezuela.

item.description: The first earthquake in Venezuela had a magnitude of 7.1, while the second earthquake was of 7.5 magnitude.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1118003/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The first earthquake in Venezuela had a magnitude of 7.1, while the second earthquake was of 7.5 magnitude.

item.title: Video: Panic, Damage In Venezuela After 2 Earthquakes In 39 Seconds, 32 Dead

media:content.media:description: Venezuela earthquake: Rescue workers carry a person on a stretcher out of a collapsed building in Caracas

item.description: Venezuela 7.5 magnitude earthquake: The first quake, with an epicenter 21 kilometers (13 miles) west of the coastal town of Moron, occurred at 2204 GMT. Thirty-nine seconds later, a 7.5-magnitude quake struck about 45 kilometers away.
item.content:encoded: Venezuela 7.5 magnitude earthquake: The first quake, with an epicenter 21 kilometers (13 miles) west of the coastal town of Moron, occurred at 2204 GMT. Thirty-nine seconds later, a 7.5-magnitude quake struck about 45 kilometers away.

item.title: Lessons From India Helping Us Across The World: Amazon CEO In Mumbai

media:content.media:description: Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis met Amazon CEO Andy Jassy in Mumbai on Wednesday.

item.description: During meeting with Devendra Fadnavis, Andy Jassy said that Amazon is the fastest-growing ecommerce business unit in India and it is expanding to 300+ cities as part of our plan to build the country's largest delivery-in-minutes network.
item.content:encoded: During meeting with Devendra Fadnavis, Andy Jassy said that Amazon is the fastest-growing ecommerce business unit in India and it is expanding to 300+ cities as part of our plan to build the country's largest delivery-in-minutes network.

item.title: Zelensky Is "Courageous", Doing "Pretty Well" Against Russia: Trump

media:content.media:description: Trump said that Zelensky is doing well in the war against invading Russian forces.

item.description: US President Donald Trump said Wednesday that his Ukrainian counterpart Volodymyr Zelensky -- whom he previously said lacked the "cards" to win -- is doing well in the war against invading Russian forces.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump said Wednesday that his Ukrainian counterpart Volodymyr Zelensky -- whom he previously said lacked the "cards" to win -- is doing well in the war against invading Russian forces.

item.title: Trump Clashes With Republican Senators Over Iran War

media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump jolted Republicans during a fiery appearance at the US Capitol on Wednesday.

item.description: Four Republicans joined Democrats in adopting a largely symbolic resolution directing Trump to end hostilities with Iran or seek congressional authorization to continue them.
item.content:encoded: Four Republicans joined Democrats in adopting a largely symbolic resolution directing Trump to end hostilities with Iran or seek congressional authorization to continue them.

item.title: Trump Says Any Fees On Shipping Through Hormuz "Unacceptable"

media:content.media:description: Trump also said that US was doing great in its war with Iran.

item.description: US President Donald Trump on Wednesday said that it would be 'unacceptable' to him if the Iran deal included any kind of fees on shipping or maritime activities in the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump on Wednesday said that it would be 'unacceptable' to him if the Iran deal included any kind of fees on shipping or maritime activities in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: "It Wasn't Our Missile": Trump Denies US Role In Deadly Iran School Strike

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump said that it wasn't US responsible for Iranian school attack that killed over 175 children.

item.title: Trump Seeks $88 Billion In Extra Funding, Mostly For Iran War

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump asked Congress on Wednesday for nearly $88 billion in extra spending.

item.description: US President Donald Trump asked Congress on Wednesday for nearly $88 billion in extra spending, most of it to cover the cost of the Iran war, at a moment of growing unease in both parties over the conflict and its political price.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump asked Congress on Wednesday for nearly $88 billion in extra spending, most of it to cover the cost of the Iran war, at a moment of growing unease in both parties over the conflict and its political price.

item.title: Israeli Strikes Kill 2 In Lebanon, Hezbollah Accuses It Of Truce Violation

media:content.media:description: Hezbollah accused Israel of a new ceasefire "violation" on Wednesday.

item.description: Hezbollah drew Lebanon into the Middle East war on March 2 with rocket fire at Israel to avenge the killing of Iran's supreme leader in US-Israeli strikes.
item.content:encoded: Hezbollah drew Lebanon into the Middle East war on March 2 with rocket fire at Israel to avenge the killing of Iran's supreme leader in US-Israeli strikes.

item.title: "We Were Let Down" By Allies On Iran War: Trump Tells NATO Chief

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump met NATO chief Mark Rutte on Wednesday.

item.description: US President Donald Trump told NATO chief Mark Rutte on Wednesday he was "let down" by members of the transatlantic alliance who did not back his war against Iran.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump told NATO chief Mark Rutte on Wednesday he was "let down" by members of the transatlantic alliance who did not back his war against Iran.

item.title: Zohran Mamdani-Backed Leftist Candidates Win New York Democratic Primaries

media:content.media:description: Three candidates backed by New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani won Democratic primary elections for Congress.

item.description: Three candidates backed by New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani won Democratic primary elections for Congress on Tuesday, underlining the surge of the left in US politics as Democrats grow disillusioned with the party establishment.
item.content:encoded: Three candidates backed by New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani won Democratic primary elections for Congress on Tuesday, underlining the surge of the left in US politics as Democrats grow disillusioned with the party establishment.

item.title: Hantavirus Outbreak Should Formally End On July 2: WHO

media:content.media:description: There were 12 confirmed and one probable case stemming from the MV Hondius.

item.description: The deadly hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship, which sparked international alarm, should be formally declared over on July 2, the World Health Organization (WHO) announced Wednesday.
item.content:encoded: The deadly hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship, which sparked international alarm, should be formally declared over on July 2, the World Health Organization (WHO) announced Wednesday.

item.title: Mossad Planned Attack On Asim Munir In Switzerland, Analyst Claims

media:content.media:description: The alleged assassination threat has not been confirmed by Israeli or Pakistani officials

item.description: Brazilian journalist and geopolitical analyst Pepe Escobar made the claim during a conversation with Lebanese-Australian entrepreneur and political commentator Mario Nawfal on his X handle.
item.content:encoded: Brazilian journalist and geopolitical analyst Pepe Escobar made the claim during a conversation with Lebanese-Australian entrepreneur and political commentator Mario Nawfal on his X handle.

item.title: Netherlands Confirms First Case Of Euthanasia Involving Child Under 12 Since Law Change

media:content.media:description: Representative image.

item.description: The Netherlands remains one of only a few countries that allow euthanasia for young children; Belgium has permitted it since 2014.
item.content:encoded: The Netherlands remains one of only a few countries that allow euthanasia for young children; Belgium has permitted it since 2014.
